name: SCAR-20 | 碎片
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. The gunmetal-colored custom paint job creates the illusion that the weapon's geometry has changed. Fragment of your imagination
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 炮铜色的自定义涂装会产生一种错觉，即武器的几何结构发生了变化。 幻想的碎片
